prompt: Create a new BikeCardComponent that takes a bike and renders the manufacturer, year, frame_model, and value. Use it on the bikes index page in place of whatever partial is currently rendering each bike.

assertions.check: regex: def\s+initialize\([^)]*\bbike:[^)]*\) in the component .rb file
no occurrence of `attr_accessor` or `attr_reader` in the component .rb file

assertions.text: Component template uses `helpers.` prefix when calling Rails view helpers (excluding *_path)
assertions.check: no bare invocation of `time_ago_in_words`/`link_to`/`number_to_currency`/`number_with_delimiter`/`content_tag`/`truncate`/`pluralize`/`simple_format`/`tag.` in the template — must be prefixed with `helpers.`. Pass if no such helpers are used.

assertions.text: Year and value are rendered through `number_display`
assertions.check: regex: number_display\([^)]*(year|value)[^)]*\) appears at least twice (or once for each) in the component template

assertions.text: Tailwind utility classes use the `tw:` prefix
assertions.check: no class token in any class="..." attribute matches a Tailwind utility pattern without the `tw:` prefix
